container.name: header.container
container.label: Page Header Container
container.htmlClass: page-header sticky top-0 z-40 border-b border-neutral-200 bg-white/95 shadow-sm

container.name: footer-container
container.label: Page Footer Container
container.htmlClass: page-footer mt-auto border-t border-neutral-200 bg-neutral-50 text-sm text-neutral-600
